result:
All confirmed. Here's the mapping:

**`ext4_file_operations`** — `fs/ext4/file.c:950-968`

| Field | Assigned function | Definition |
|---|---|---|
| `.read_iter` | `ext4_file_read_iter` | `fs/ext4/file.c:130` (static, ends line 148) |
| `.write_iter` | `ext4_file_write_iter` | `fs/ext4/file.c:702` (non-static, signature starts 702, name on 703, ends 718) |
| `.open` | `ext4_file_open` | `fs/ext4/file.c:878` (static, ends 910) |
| `.release` | `ext4_release_file` | `fs/ext4/file.c:166` (static, ends 184) |
| `.fsync` | `ext4_sync_file` | `fs/ext4/fsync.c:129` (non-static, ends 181) — note this one lives in a different file |

All five fields are present in the struct literal — none are absent. (Other fields also present but not asked about: `.llseek`, `.iopoll`, `.unlocked_ioctl`, `.compat_ioctl`, `.mmap`, `.mmap_supported_flags`, `.get_unmapped_area`, `.splice_read`, `.splice_write`, `.fallocate`.)
